challenge.title: Korak 15
challenge.description:
Unutar elementa footer, dodaj element sa section koji ima id postavljen na contact.

Unutar elementa section, dodajte element h2 sa tekstom Contact.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Mr. Whiskers' Blog Page!

  • About
  • Posts
  • Contact

About

Hi there! I'm Jane Doe, a passionate writer who finds endless inspiration in the antics of my beloved cat, Mr. Whiskers.

His playful nature and boundless energy keeps me on my toes. I love him so much.

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš element section unutar svog elementa footer.
Vaš element za section mora imati id postavljeno na "contact".
Trebalo bi da imaš element h2 unutar tvog elementa section.
